name: nobg
title: Background Remover
description: Remove background from images using local rembg
author: jordanbastin

commands.name: remove-background
commands.title: Remove Background
commands.description: Remove background from an image (Finder selection, clipboard, or Downloads)

preferences.name: outputFolder
preferences.title: Output Folder
preferences.description: Folder name inside Downloads where images will be saved

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
